title: UCB — Projects
html:
UCB Active Projects & Workstreams

Governing Thought

UCB has 5 active or recently active ZoomRx projects across 3 TAs, with 8 additional completed/stale projects forming the engagement history. The account is in a transition phase — the Briviact-era studies (2022-2023) are complete, and the current active work centers on Bimzelx immunology PETs and Fintepla epilepsy tracking. The gMG HCP-Pt study is complete with no follow-on currently in pipeline — this represents an at-risk TA for engagement continuity.

Account Health Dashboard

Workstream TA Status Last Modified Key Observation
Bimzelx Dermatology PET Immunology :blue_circle: Active Feb 2026 W1 (Q1-Q2 2026) in progress; first PET wave for Bimzelx in derm
Bimzelx Rheumatology PET Immunology :blue_circle: New Feb 2026 Kick-off phase; survey draft V0.1 uploaded Apr 2026
Fintepla PET Epilepsy :green_circle: Active Nov 2025 Most mature active project; includes Qual component and REMs benchmarking
Nayzilam & Staccato ATU Epilepsy :yellow_circle: Watch Jul 2025 Wave 1 complete (Dec 2025). No Wave 2 visible — check renewal status
Bimzelx HCP-Pt Immunology :white_circle: Complete Apr 2025 Completed 2024-2025. Rich dataset on psoriasis conversations
gMG HCP-Pt gMG :white_circle: Complete Apr 2025 Completed 2025. No follow-on project — at-risk for TA disengagement
Briviact & Nayzilam PET Epilepsy :white_circle: Complete Apr 2025 Multi-wave PET program completed; historical baseline data exists
Briviact Hospital Integrated Study Epilepsy :white_circle: Complete Apr 2025 Hospital-based study completed; institutional knowledge exists
Briviact Non-User Study Epilepsy :white_circle: Complete Oct 2023 Earliest UCB project; non-user methodology established

Legend: :blue_circle: New/Active | :green_circle: Active/On Track | :yellow_circle: Watch (renewal uncertain) | :white_circle: Complete/Stale

Detailed Workstream Profiles

Bimzelx Dermatology PET

Status: Active | Wave: W1 (Q1-Q2 2026) | TA: Immunology

What it covers: PET tracking of Bimzelx rep effectiveness in dermatology — measuring SOV, message recall, call quality, and competitive positioning against Cosentyx, Taltz, Skyrizi, and Tremfya.

SharePoint structure: 08 Bimzelx Dermatology PET/W1 (Q1-Q2 2026)/ — single wave folder, early stage.

What to watch: This is the first quantitative tracking for Bimzelx. Wave 1 results will set the baseline for competitive benchmarking and establish whether ZoomRx becomes the ongoing PET vendor for Bimzelx immunology.

Bimzelx Rheumatology PET

Status: Kick-off | Wave: Pre-W1 | TA: Immunology

What it covers: PET tracking of Bimzelx rep effectiveness in rheumatology — different HCP audience (rheumatologists) with different competitive set (Cosentyx/Taltz more established in axSpA/PsA, Rinvoq/JAK class dynamics).

SharePoint structure: 09 Bimzelx Rheumatology PET/ — kick-off materials, survey draft V0.1 uploaded Apr 2026.

What to watch: Rheumatology PET opens a second HCP audience for Bimzelx tracking. Combined Derm + Rheum PET creates franchise-level immunology tracking potential.

Fintepla PET (with Qual)

Status: Active | TA: Epilepsy

What it covers: PET tracking of Fintepla rep effectiveness in rare epilepsy (Dravet, LGS) with integrated qualitative research component. Includes REMs HII benchmarking.

SharePoint structure: 06 Fintepla PET/ — mature project folder with Analysis, Reports, QUAL, Recruitment, Survey Draft, Target List, Reference Materials, Background Materials, KO Deck, Messages, and AE Training subfolders. REMs HII Benchmarking.xlsx also present (Nov 2025).

What to watch: Most structured and mature active project. The Qual integration and REMs benchmarking suggest a sophisticated engagement. Fintepla's Rett syndrome expansion (submission Q1 2026) could generate new tracking scope.

Nayzilam & Staccato ATU

Status: Wave 1 Complete | TA: Epilepsy

What it covers: Awareness, trial, and usage tracking for rescue therapies (Nayzilam nasal spray and Staccato alprazolam) in seizure cluster management.

SharePoint structure: 07 UCB_Nayzilam and Staccato_ATU_2025/Wave 1/ — single wave completed Dec 2025.

What to watch: No Wave 2 visible in SharePoint. Check whether renewal/continuation is planned. If not, this project type (ATU) may go dormant for UCB.

Pipeline / Upcoming Work

Based on UCB's pipeline and current engagement gaps, the following projects are likely candidates for the next 12 months:

Opportunity TA Type Trigger
Bimzelx HS PET Immunology PET HS approved Nov 2024; new HCP audience (surgeons, dermatologists treating HS). Natural extension of Derm PET.
Fintepla Rett Syndrome Tracking Epilepsy PET or ATU Submission planned Q1 2026; approval could trigger launch tracking
gMG PET or MEE gMG PET / MEE Rystiggo +65% YoY growth; Vyvgart competitive dynamic needs tracking. HCP-Pt study is complete — next step is ongoing tracking.
Nayzilam ATU Wave 2 Epilepsy ATU Dependent on renewal decision
Bimzelx Derm PET Wave 2+ Immunology PET Continuation of W1 tracking

Back to Accounts Hub | Home
